violations.text: Microwave located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, observed with tape holding the display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The automatic dispenser at the 3-bay sink is not dispensing sanitizer. Establishment is utilizing alternative methods for 3-bay sink at this time. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
A leak was observed at the automatic dispenser of the 3-bay sink. PIC stated work order is in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
An accumulation of boxes was observed in the dumpster area. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The hood vents and walls have an accumulation of grease residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Inspector provided application and change of address form. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Eggs were observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC returned all foods in unit to walk-in to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
The following were not in good repair: -Cold hold unit at griddle (not maintaining temperature) -microwave (taped) New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
Per PIC, the dish washing machine is inoperable. All equipment and utensils are cleaned and sanitized in 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

The automatic dispenser at the 3-bay sink was not dispensing sanitizer. PIC obtained alternative sanitizing solution and filled 3-bay to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -reach-in freezer lower shelf -cup wells at register area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
A leak was observed at the automatic dispenser for the 3-bay sink. PIC stated work order is in place and is awaiting part. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris: -ventilation hood vents and walls -walk-in freezer floor -floor at mop sink (Corrected during inspection). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Spanish Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Proper signage is lacking hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and women's toilet room. A sign or poster reminding employees to wash their hands is required at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
The dumpster enclosure is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2024
Hood panels have an accumulation of grease droplets. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
